steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The signal is the structure “by no means ______” immediately followed by “indeed, Banisadr himself cites Bosch as an inspiration.” The word “indeed” confirms that recognizing Bosch's influence is definitely a real and obvious fact.

The blank must contain a word that, when negated by “by no means,” captures this certainty.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Unimportant in the blank creates “by no means unimportant”—meaning definitely important, which captures the undeniable status of Bosch's influence in Banisadr's work.

The other three choices fail to produce this meaning: “substantial” and “appropriate” are already positive words that would contradict the passage when negated, and “satisfying” is irrelevant to influence recognition.

That matches choice C—C is correct.
